response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience, but the role specifically requires a senior C++ developer with deep expertise in STL, multi-threading, message brokers, MQTT/REST IoT systems, and IEC 62443 secure development. The resume shows only a brief 6-month stint writing C/C++ at National Instruments in 2014-2015, with the bulk of recent work in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. There is no evidence of industrial automation, IEC 62443/SDL practices, MQTT, or relevant industrial protocols.
strengths: 13+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Strong background in testing, TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices
Experience with high-throughput, low-latency systems (Sociomantic) and event-driven architectures (GISCollective)
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience — only one short role nearly a decade ago
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, Secure Development Lifecycle, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No exposure to MQTT, industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850), or automation machinery domain

key_factors.factor: No IEC 62443 / SDL or industrial security background
Strong general engineering breadth and seniority
